<@289320818901778434> Hi! Just read your lore doc and I noticed a few things missing:
-in the inspiration section, Captain Elton and Rogers are both directly based off the white ship and the horror in the museum respectively 
-Salvador's death should probably be on the before flood timeline as we have a date for it and its both before and directly related to the founding of the lightbearers
-In addition to Ambrose Dexter, Dexter might also be a ref to Charles dexter ward with the whole identity theft thing
-Wanda references both Glaaki and Wanda von Dunajew from Venus in Furs

I'd also argue that Karen is a whole plot reference ala Celeste and not thuum'ha, she's p clearly from sarnath and is one of the nameless slaves in the og story. Also I personally don't believe ryker is based off Holmes as he makes direct references to the stories in-universe with his calling keeper his watson. (I'm p sure his dice are based off the shining trapezohedron though)
Oh and Faros might be based off the sonnet The Elder Pharos in The Fungi From Yuggoth.

embeds.title: Thaïs
embeds.description: Thaïs (; Greek: Θαΐς; fl. 4th century BCE) was a Greek hetaira who accompanied Alexander the Great on his military campaigns. Likely from Athens, she is most famous for having instigated the burning of Persepolis, the capital city of the Achaemenid Persian Empire, after it was conquered by Alexander
